missionId.description: Canonical mission id. Must be one of the mission ids known to the server mission catalog.

status.description: Mission lifecycle status. Supported values are available, started, in-progress, failed, completed, locked, abandoned, paused, and turned-in.

statusDetail.description: Optional freeform detail preserved with the mission status update.

requestId.description: Optional request correlation id echoed in the response when provided.
